prestazioni: EN07X 659cc inline-4 DOHC 16V turbocharged engine: Replace the stock IHI RHB31 turbo with a **Garrett GT1241Z** (52mm compressor, 41mm turbine) paired with a **HKS Super Power Flow Type-R 4-2-1 stainless header** and **Toda Racing forged pistons (8.5:1 CR)** for 180+ hp at 8,500 RPM on E85 fuel. Use a **Haltech Elite 1500 ECU** with **ID1000x injectors** and a **Radium Engineering fuel surge tank** to handle 300+ kPa boost.

Full **Cusco Type-RS 4-point bolt-in roll cage** with **Sparco Pro 2000 seats** and **Schroth 6-point harnesses** to stiffen the chassis for **Tein Flex Z coilovers (8kg/mm front, 6kg/mm rear)** with **Whiteline adjustable sway bars (18mm front, 16mm rear)** and **SuperPro poly bushings** for rally-spec handling.

**OS Giken Super Lock LSD** (2-way) with **KAAZ 1.5-way clutch** and **PPG close-ratio 5-speed dogbox (GR650 ratios)** for Group A rally durability. Pair with **DBA 5000 Series rotors** (240mm front, 220mm rear) and **Project Mu B-Spec pads** for 1,000km+ gravel endurance.
estetica: **Liberty Walk Vivio RX-R Rally Widebody Kit** (FRP construction, 50mm flares) with **Voltex Type-3 rear wing** (carbon fiber, 300mm chord) and **Seibon carbon fiber hood** (vented, 1.5kg weight reduction).

**WRC-style Recaro Pole Position seats** (Kei-car legal, FIA-homologated) with **Takata Drift II harnesses** and **Defi BF Silver gauges** (boost, oil temp, wideband) mounted in a **JDM Works carbon fiber gauge pod**.

**Hella Rallye 3000 FF fog lights** (H3 55W bulbs) with **PIAA 520 rally horns** and **OMP carbon fiber mirror covers**. Full **3M 1080 Matte White vinyl wrap** with **Rally Armor UR mud flaps** (Subaru logo cutouts) and **Driftworks Kei-car decal kit** (red/black).
